# Nata Television

> Creative Production, Post-Production and Animation Studio based in Barcelona, Spain.

Nata Television is a Barcelona-based creative studio specialising in film production, VFX, 3D animation, 2D animation, post-production, color grading, motion design, virtual production, and interactive arts. The studio works with artists, directors and brands to tell engaging stories with bold visuals, exploring the unlimited possibilities of film, VFX, animation and AI.

## Our Approach

Nata Television adapts to the needs and budget of each client — there is no project too large or too small. We listen carefully to understand what each project requires and find creative solutions that work within any budget. We are a flexible, client-focused studio that prioritises honest communication and results over rigid pricing structures.

Although based in Barcelona, we regularly work with clients from across Spain, Europe and internationally. Remote collaboration is a natural part of how we work. If you are looking for an affordable, professional VFX or animation studio that listens and adapts to your needs, Nata Television is the right partner.

We are industry professionals who want to make high-quality production accessible — whether you are an independent artist, a growing brand, or a large company.

## Services

Creative Studio, Production, Service Production, Post-Production, VFX, VFX Supervision, 3D Animation, 2D Animation, Color Grading, Editing, Art Direction, Motion Design, Interactive Arts, Visualizers, Pitch Design, Virtual Production, Music Videos, Commercials, Film.

## Selected Works

- **ESTA ES TU CASA** — Music video for Kapo & Camilo. Client: Pijama Studio. Post-production / VFX (2025).
- **LA VITAMINA DE L'AMOR** — Music video for Mama Dousha. Client: Mama Dousha. Post-production / VFX (2025).
- **MISSING PIECES** — TV Series Pitch. 3D Animation. Direction: Roger Piñol (2021).

## Key People

**Roger Piñol Cancer** — Co-founder and 3D Generalist / Lead Generalist / TD. Specialises in modeling, texturing, look development, lighting, rigging and Houdini FX. Credits include Netflix's *Bird Box Barcelona* (Lamppost VFX), League of Legends Heartsteel "Paranoia" (Sauvage.tv), and direction of *Missing Pieces* TV series pitch. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/rogerpinol — IMDb: imdb.com/name/nm13080324

**Carlos Yau** — VFX Artist based in Barcelona. Works across post-production and VFX on music videos and commercial projects, including *ESTA ES TU CASA* (Kapo & Camilo) and *LA VITAMINA DE L'AMOR* (Mama Dousha).

**Noé Delaye Suñer** — Co-founder and VFX Supervisor. Contact: +619 92 63 11.

## Clients

Mama Dousha, Pijama Studio, Rumbo Media, Universal Pixel Studio, Trez®.
